data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Limiting choices on each page to reduce decision-making time.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designing buttons and links for easy accessibility and clicking.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Important items placed at the start and end of lists.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Consistent UI patterns that are familiar to users.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button styles, Familiar navigation headers

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Grouping information to improve cognitive load efficiency.
